entries.content:
## Morning Briefing
- Pipeline value up 12% WoW ($2.85M active)
- 3 new inbound leads overnight (Olympic Steel, Bellevue Dynamics via ZoomInfo, Cascade Financial via LinkedIn)
- Recruiter Maria Santos hit 4 placements this week — team lead performance
- 2 candidates from CEIPAL database matched to open Java developer req
- RingCentral flagged 3 calls with low conversion scores — review recommended
- QuickBooks: $312K outstanding receivables, $189K in 30-day bucket
- Recycled 7 candidates from closed reqs into active pipeline

## Overnight Activity
- Enriched 45 CEIPAL contacts via ZoomInfo
- Drafted 12 personalized outreach emails for dormant client reactivation
- Analyzed 28 RingCentral call transcripts from yesterday
- Updated recruiter scorecards with weekly metrics

## Key Actions
- Completed database mining scan: 847 candidates flagged for potential re-engagement
- ZoomInfo enrichment batch: 200 contacts updated with current employment data
- 2 placements confirmed: Pacific Northwest Health (RN) and TechCorp Solutions (Senior Dev)
- Morning briefing delivered 8:00 AM PST
- Call analysis: average call score 7.2/10, up from 6.8 last week
- Identified 5 candidates rejected for Role A that match open reqs in healthcare vertical

## Pipeline Update
- New lead: Rainier Biotech — FDA approval driving hiring surge
- Emerald City Logistics moved to Contacted stage after initial outreach
- Updated February recruiter scorecards — distributed to team leads
- QuickBooks sync: February revenue finalized at $1.235M (28 placements)
- Dormant client scan identified 23 accounts inactive 12+ months with previous placement history
